notes: Chunk contains a single event: part 2 of 2 of the 10-Q filed 2024-08-07 (MD&A non-GAAP reconciliations, system-wide/franchise sales, liquidity & capital resources, risk factors stub); no fiscal_kpis array in this chunk.

Skipped (8): raw material constraints (boilerplate caveat list on capex, vague); restaurant remodels/relocations (use-of-cash list, folded into new_restaurant_development evidence); effective tax rate (its causes coined separately as deferred_tax_valuation_allowance and convertible_notes_repurchase tax costs); net income / adjusted net income (headline rollup, covered by diluted_eps and operating_margin); convertible note hedge / warrant early-termination settlement (folded into convertible_notes_repurchase, same transaction complex); ASR agreement with bank (folded into share_repurchase_program, same authorization); liquidity / unused borrowing capacity (bare category, too broad); Risk Factors section (states no material changes from 2023 10-K, nothing to coin).

Hong Kong and U.S. closures bundled into one reusable class restaurant_closures since the filing attributes the charges to both decisions jointly; asset_impairment_charges kept separate per R2 (independent accounting variable).
Earnings convention applied only to capital_expenditure_guidance (forward estimate); no consensus comparison appears in this part, so no *_surprise names were coined.
